generated_oml:
instance LabScaleGantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system in industrial automation research domain"
    base:contains PhysicalCraneStructure, IntegratedControllerUnit
]

instance PhysicalCraneStructure : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical structure of the lab-scale gantry crane with measurable kinematic dynamics"
]

instance IntegratedControllerUnit : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller unit integrated into physical crane for motion control"
]

instance CranePositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring position coordinates of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CranePositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring velocity of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneAccelerationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring acceleration of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneAccelerationDataTransmitted
]

instance CranePositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionSensor
]

instance CraneVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneVelocitySensor
]

instance CraneAccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneAccelerationSensor
]

instance CranePositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CranePositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Velocity data of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Acceleration data of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneAccelerationDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time state data of the lab-scale gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CranePositionDataTransmitted, CraneVelocityDataTransmitted, CraneAccelerationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBLoggingEnabler, OptimalControlEnabler, RealTimeVisualizationEnabler, ContinuousValidationEnabler
]

instance TimescaleDBLoggingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for logging crane state data into TimescaleDB database"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance OptimalControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for optimal control of gantry crane motion using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time data visualization of crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance ContinuousValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for continuous validation of physical-virtual synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance CraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for motion planning in lab-scale gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo OptimalControlEnabler
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing optimal control for motion planning using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for historical data logging of operational metrics"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time data visualization through interactive interfaces"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service ensuring synchronization between physical and digital systems through continuous validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SynchronizationInsight
]

instance OptimalControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal motion planning for gantry crane movement"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical operational metrics for system diagnostics"
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of real-time crane operations"
]

instance SynchronizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous validation ensuring physical and digital system synchronization"
]

instance AirQualityAutomationMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AutomationML-based digital twin model for indoor air quality management in construction engineering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureDataPipelineEnabler
]

instance AzureDataPipelineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microsoft Azure tools for data pipeline implementation in air quality management"
    DTDFVocab:enables AirQualityVisualizationService, AirQualitySimulationService, AirQualityPredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance RealTimeAirQualityVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Runtime visualization for real-time indoor air quality monitoring"
]

instance VirusSpreadSimulation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation for virus spread scenario testing"
]

instance AirQualityPredictiveAnalytics : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for forecasting air quality conditions in construction engineering"
]

instance AirQualityVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time air quality monitoring visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeAirQualityVisualization
]

instance AirQualitySimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for virus spread scenario simulation"
    DTDFVocab:provides VirusSpreadSimulation
]

instance AirQualityPredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for air quality predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityPredictiveAnalytics
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering methodologies applied to Air Quality Management digital twin development"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelDevelopmentService
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for architecture visualization of Lab Scale Gantry Crane"
]

instance GitHubVersionControlSystem : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub repositories for version control across exemplars"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelVersioningService
]

instance ContainerizationTechnology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization and virtualization technologies for deployment and dissemination"
    DTDFVocab:enables DeploymentService
]

instance ModelDevelopmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for developing digital twin models using Model-Driven Engineering"
]

instance ModelVersioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for managing model versions across digital twin exemplars"
]

instance DeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for deploying digital twin instances using containerization"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from the Control Application (Python) are transmitted via the Physical Crane Interface to the crane controllers, utilizing trajectories generated by the Trajectory Generator Service. Specific command formats, validation mechanisms, authentication, feedback systems, and execution confirmations are not detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system employs the C4 Model for architectural visualization with context and container diagrams, utilizing virtualization technologies for deployment. Core components include InfluxDB for time-series data storage, ActiveMQ as a message broker for communication, and Microsoft Azure services for cloud processing. The implementation follows an ad-hoc approach without a commercial digital twin framework, integrating physical sensors and digital components through standardized protocols."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Digital twin services communicate via an MQTT Broker for inter-service signaling, with TimescaleDB used for data storage. Network topology, bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability mechanisms, and security protocols are not specified."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Uses AutomationML for standardized data exchange in construction engineering contexts, integrates with Microsoft Azure cloud services for digital twin pipeline management, and employs ActiveMQ message broker for real-time communication between physical sensors and digital components."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar implements an AutomationML-based digital twin for standardized data exchange in construction engineering, with Microsoft Azure cloud services used for pipeline implementation."
]
